name: Matrix Academy
description: Delhi's premier coaching institute for CBSE, ICSE, and competitive exam preparation. With experienced faculty and proven results, we guide 1000+ students toward academic success across our two branches.

keyFeatures.title: Expert Faculty
keyFeatures.description: Highly qualified teachers with 10+ years of experience

keyFeatures.title: Proven Results
keyFeatures.description: 95% students score above 90% in board exams

keyFeatures.title: Small Batches
keyFeatures.description: Maximum 15-20 students per batch for personalized attention

keyFeatures.title: Modern Infrastructure
keyFeatures.description: AC classrooms with smart boards and digital learning tools

keyFeatures.title: Regular Tests
keyFeatures.description: Weekly tests and monthly assessments to track progress

keyFeatures.title: Parent Connect
keyFeatures.description: Monthly parent-teacher meetings and progress reports
